title: You Have Been Warned Again
subTitle: Counting down the world's greatest viral homemade science stunts and experiments.

title: Food Factory
subTitle: Discover how Canadian butter tarts, leaf-shaped maple syrup candies, ice cream and Canadian Caesar drinks are made, from raw materials to finished products.

title: Food Factory USA
subTitle: On a quest for the ultimate bacon experience, tour a Texas smokehouse where they serve bacon-flavoured soda, and a former turkey farm with chocolate bacon bits.

title: How the Universe Works
subTitle: The Rosetta mission was an ground-breaking expedition to land on a comet for the very first time; special access reveals what this cutting-edge journey discovered and how these mysterious objects helped create life on Earth.

title: My Feet Are Killing Me
subTitle: Dr. Vincent uses a cadaver bone to fix a woman's foot who's deathly afraid of infection; surgery to correct a woman's webbed toes becomes a crisis for Dr. Schaeffer when she develops a dangerous complication that could cost the patient her toes.

title: Skin Tight
subTitle: Antonia took control of her battle with food addiction to lose 190lbs, but the extra skin is keeping her from feeling confident and sexy. Natasha lost almost 300lbs after gastric bypass surgery, but struggles with carrying a lot of saggy excess skin.

title: Bering Sea Gold
subTitle: Shawn and Kris battle encroaching miners. Ken's beastly Myrtle Irene continues to invade and operating costs soar. Emily expands her operation, but an air malfunction threatens her season.

title: My Feet Are Killing Me
subTitle: Dr. Vincent uses a cadaver bone to fix a woman's foot who's deathly afraid of infection; surgery to correct a woman's webbed toes becomes a crisis for Dr. Schaeffer when she develops a dangerous complication that could cost the patient her toes.

title: You Have Been Warned Again
subTitle: Bringing you the very best of viral video madness, with more internet heroes creating dangerous experiments. Including, how to jump from a plane without a parachute.

title: Food Factory
subTitle: Discover how spicy barbeque sauce, veggie burgers, fresh pineapple pieces and relish are made, from raw materials to finished products.

title: Food Factory USA
subTitle: Visit Sunkist's squeaky clean lemon headquarters in California, discover amazing freeze-dried astronaut food, and a Texan pecan pie.

title: How the Universe Works
subTitle: Galaxies are locked in continual combat across the universe, and our own Milky Way will face its biggest opponent ever, the Andromeda Galaxy, in a titanic and deadly struggle that could create a new and unrecognizable super galaxy.

title: Skin Tight
subTitle: Stephanie and her mum Darcy lost a combined weight of 320 pounds. BJ overcame drug and food addiction to lose 350 pounds and his body is now covered with excess skin.

title: Bering Sea Gold
subTitle: To fund the mega-dredge, Shawn races to the Bluff where Kris is onto some of the best gold. Emily's most promising summer might suddenly be dashed on the rocks.

title: Haunted Towns
subTitle: The team head to Wyoming to investigate a former frontier town known for the botched hanging of a notorious criminal. Is he seeking revenge from the afterlife?

subTitle: Counting down the world's greatest viral homemade science stunts and experiments.

subTitle: Discover how Canadian butter tarts, leaf-shaped maple syrup candies, ice cream and Canadian Caesar drinks are made, from raw materials to finished products.

title: Bering Sea Gold
subTitle: Shawn and Kris battle encroaching miners. Ken's beastly Myrtle Irene continues to invade and operating costs soar. Emily expands her operation, but an air malfunction threatens her season.

title: Haunted Towns
subTitle: The team head to the Old Idaho State Penitentiary. Here, they hope to encounter the spirits of two infamous murderers who are rumoured to haunt the building.

title: How It's Made
subTitle: Discover how Swiss Army knives, oil tankers, and racing wheels are made.

title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
subTitle: New evidence could explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle. A team of experts investigate if aliens have visited this stretch of water.

title: Food Factory
subTitle: Pickled asparagus, chilli-chocolate caramels, chocolate coffee syrup, ready-to-eat beetroots are made, from raw materials to finished products.

title: Food Factory USA
subTitle: An army of workers serve Cold Stone ice cream, five Vietnamese brothers perfect flaky French pastries, and watch flying fish while ordering crab cakes in Seattle.

title: How the Universe Works
subTitle: New discoveries reveal an astonishing supermassive black hole that was born during the earliest days of the cosmos, and finding out how this giant grew so large so quickly may help to explain the very formation of the universe itself.

title: My Feet Are Killing Me
subTitle: Dr Vincent faces an 8-hour surgery to repair the worst case of dancer's feet she's seen. A woman's club feet give Dr Schaeffer a shock when he removes her shoes.

title: Dr. Pimple Popper
subTitle: With pandemic safety protocols in place, Dr. Lee reopens her office. Monica has a large birthmark growing on the side of her face. Jackie has a melon-sized lump on the back of her shoulder. Reginald has large, rare growths on the back of his head.

title: Deadliest Catch
subTitle: A massive arctic hurricane shocks the fleet with high winds and big waves. An unstable stack threatens to capsize the Saga, as the captains rush to pull and set pots before harbour.

title: Ghost Adventures
subTitle: The crew head to the coastal town of Oxnard in California in order to help a couple who are tormented by unseen forces in their own home. As they investigate, Zak makes a surprising connection that may shed light on the paranormal presence.

title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
subTitle: New evidence could explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle. A team of experts investigate if aliens have visited this stretch of water.

title: Food Factory
subTitle: We celebrate Thanksgiving with four holiday favourites: Pepperidge Farms' stuffing, delicious pumpkin pie, crispy marshmallow treats, and cranberry sauce.

subTitle: Explores some of the Lone Star State's favourite foods: including chicken-free Chick-O-Sticks candy, and a two-ounce energy drink that delivers a wallop.

title: Into The Universe With Stephen Hawking
subTitle: Stephen Hawking, a renowned physicist, talks about the Big Bang, the possible existence of aliens, time travel and the universe as a whole.

title: My Feet Are Killing Me
subTitle: A man with a huge lump on his foot mystifies Dr Vincent. Dr Schaeffer encounters a wart cluster covering a man's foot, and he faces a double big toe.

title: Dr. Pimple Popper
subTitle: Can Dr. Lee provide the help Reginald needs in order to remove the large rare growths on the back of his head? Che'Re has a prominent bump on her face that has put her in a dark place. Juan has several painful boils on the back of his neck.

title: Deadliest Catch
subTitle: The crews of the Northwestern, Seabrooke, Time Bandit, Wizard, Kodiak and Ramblin' Rose return to the perilous, icy waters of the Bering Sea for more hardcore crab fishing.

subTitle: The crew pierces the seal on California's Mira Loma Detention Center; decades of death, violence and bloodshed have scarred this massive compound, painting a thick layer of doom on every square inch and delivering some of the most solid evidence yet.

title: How It's Made
subTitle: A journey into the world of complex mechanisms surrounding contemporary man, highlighting the creation of unique products and the commitment, passion, and work of the people who create them.

title: Food Factory
subTitle: Discover how Halloween-themed jack-o-lantern cookies, candied corn, lollipops and gruesome gummies are made, from raw materials to finished products.

title: India Decides : The Election Story
subTitle: India Decides : The Election Story

title: How It's Made
subTitle: An insight into the production processes that go into making hammers, Swiss cheese, roller skates, and coloured pencils.

title: Food Factory USA
subTitle: See the mountains of meat required to keep up with White Castle's demand, as well as a machine that processes 1.7 million mandarin oranges every hour.

title: Into The Universe With Stephen Hawking
subTitle: Stephen Hawking, a renowned physicist, talks about the Big Bang, the possible existence of aliens, time travel and the universe as a whole.

title: My Feet Are Killing Me
subTitle: Dr. Vincent performs a delicate surgery when she treats a toddler born with 12 toes; Dr. Schaeffer meets a nudist with funky feet; things get tense during a foot reconstruction procedure when the patient wakes up in the middle of surgery.

title: Dr. Pimple Popper
subTitle: Dennis has several giant growths on the back of his head. Juan has a rare condition he hopes Dr. Lee will understand. Natalie searches for answers as to why her body is covered in hundreds of mysterious dark bumps.

title: Deadliest Catch
subTitle: Sean and Casey forge an alliance but when one strikes crab, will he betray it? Plus, will Wild Bill's risky new bait and fishing strategy pay off big?

title: Ghost Adventures
subTitle: Zak Bagans, Aaron Goodwin, Billy Tolley and Jay Wasley investigate the most haunted places in the world, During the dusk-to-dawn lockdown, the crew documents key evidence to uncover the truth behind paranormal activity.

title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
subTitle: Experts are hot on the trail of a legendary sea monster that reportedly lives in the underwater caves of the Bermuda Triangle; divers hunt for the deadly beast in underwater chambers.
